title: eryngium leptophyllum
intro: Eryngium leptophyllum, also known as Sea Holly or Coral Plant, is a flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eryngium leptophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Eryngium leptophyllum can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
